commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal resolved source-reply delivery-mode callback from shared dispatch to Telegram, suppresses Telegram fallback when automatic source delivery is message-tool-only, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main still has Telegram fallback paths outside the message-tool-only guard and duplicate/inflight shared dispatch returns before delivery-mode reporting.
